---
title: "Data Science Lab"
listing:
  - id: experiments-grid
    contents: "experiments/."
    max-items: 5
    type: default
    exclude: 
      filename: "index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    # categories: true
    fields: [title, date, description, image]
---

This site is a collection of small experiments exploring data science with R.

## Recent Experiments

::: {#experiments-grid}
:::
